mapper.sql: select return_id, order_id, order_no, return_no, return_type, return_reason, return_description, return_images, return_status, receive_status, return_amount, return_shipping_fee, return_express_company, return_express_no, return_shipping_time, seller_receive_time, seller_receive_remark, refund_time, refund_amount, refund_remark, approve_time, approve_deadline, reject_reason, reject_time, shipping_deadline, complete_time, cancel_time, create_time, update_time from product_order_return
mapper.select: where order_id = #{orderId} order by create_time desc
where order_no = #{orderNo} order by create_time desc

select por.return_id as returnId, por.order_id as orderId, por.order_no as orderNo, por.return_no as returnNo, por.return_type as returnType, por.return_reason as returnReason, por.return_description as returnDescription, por.return_images as returnImages, por.return_status as returnStatus, por.return_amount as returnAmount, por.return_shipping_fee as returnShippingFee, por.return_express_company as returnExpressCompany, por.return_express_no as returnExpressNo, por.return_shipping_time as returnShippingTime, por.approve_time as approveTime, por.approve_deadline as approveDeadline, por.reject_reason as rejectReason, por.reject_time as rejectTime, por.shipping_deadline as shippingDeadline, por.complete_time as completeTime, por.cancel_time as cancelTime, por.create_time as createTime, por.update_time as updateTime, po.product_title as productTitle, po.product_image as productImage, po.order_amount as orderAmount, po.user_id as userId, po.seller_id as sellerId from product_order_return por inner join product_order po on por.order_id = po.order_id where po.user_id = #{userId} order by por.create_time desc

select por.return_id as returnId, por.order_id as orderId, por.order_no as orderNo, por.return_no as returnNo, por.return_type as returnType, por.return_reason as returnReason, por.return_description as returnDescription, por.return_images as returnImages, por.return_status as returnStatus, por.return_amount as returnAmount, por.return_shipping_fee as returnShippingFee, por.return_express_company as returnExpressCompany, por.return_express_no as returnExpressNo, por.return_shipping_time as returnShippingTime, por.approve_time as approveTime, por.approve_deadline as approveDeadline, por.reject_reason as rejectReason, por.reject_time as rejectTime, por.shipping_deadline as shippingDeadline, por.complete_time as completeTime, por.cancel_time as cancelTime, por.create_time as createTime, por.update_time as updateTime, IFNULL(po.product_title, '') as productTitle, IFNULL(po.product_image, '') as productImage, po.order_amount as orderAmount, po.user_id as userId, po.product_id as productId, IFNULL(po.order_status, '') as orderStatus, IFNULL(po.shipping_status, '0') as shippingStatus, p.seller_id as sellerId from product_order_return por inner join product_order po on por.order_id = po.order_id inner join product p on po.product_id = p.product_id where p.seller_id = #{sellerId} order by por.create_time desc
mapper.insert:
insert into product_order_return
order_id, order_no, return_no, return_type, return_reason, return_description, return_images, return_status, receive_status, return_amount, return_shipping_fee, return_express_company, return_express_no, return_shipping_time, seller_receive_time, seller_receive_remark, refund_time, refund_amount, refund_remark, approve_time, approve_deadline, reject_reason, reject_time, shipping_deadline, complete_time, cancel_time, create_time, update_time,
#{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{returnNo}, #{returnType}, #{returnReason}, #{returnDescription}, #{returnImages}, #{returnStatus}, #{receiveStatus}, #{returnAmount}, #{returnShippingFee}, #{returnExpressCompany}, #{returnExpressNo}, #{returnShippingTime}, #{sellerReceiveTime}, #{sellerReceiveRemark}, #{refundTime}, #{refundAmount}, #{refundRemark}, #{approveTime}, #{approveDeadline}, #{rejectReason}, #{rejectTime}, #{shippingDeadline}, #{completeTime}, #{cancelTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from product_order_return where return_id in
#{returnId}
